modules.name: VI
modules.effect: live 4K visible-light input scaled by RESIZE_RGA to the existing VI page layout through VI->RESIZE_RGA->VMIX->OSD->VO bind display

modules.name: VPSS
modules.effect: four-output crop/scale/flip fanout through VMIX/OSD/VO with VO capture

modules.name: VO
modules.effect: portrait dashboard display

modules.name: WBC
modules.effect: Scaled VI reference beside scaled VO_WBC capture mixed back to VO

modules.name: RGA
modules.source: camera 3840x2160 direct to RGA, then 1080x608 display frame
modules.effect: hardware 2D COPY/CROP_ZOOM/FLIP/ROTATE operation loop with 1080-wide live view and VO capture

modules.name: RESIZE_RGA
modules.source: camera 3840x2160 direct to RESIZE_RGA, then 1080x608 display frame
modules.effect: dynamic even-aligned crop window and hardware scale/zoom with 1080-wide live view and VO capture

modules.name: CSC_RGA
modules.effect: RGA color conversion path

modules.name: CSC_CL
modules.source: camera 3840x2160 direct to CSC_CL, then RESIZE_RGA 1080x1920
modules.effect: OpenCL 4K NV12->ARGB color matrix conversion, post-process full-screen resize, ARGB OSD overlay, kernel/queue timing, and VO capture

modules.name: OSD
modules.effect: two-stage OSD dynamic regions with zorder, alpha, enabled alert, status overlay, and VO capture

modules.name: CLAHE
modules.source: camera 3840x2160 direct to CLAHE, then aspect-preserving RESIZE_RGA 1080x608
modules.effect: 1s passthrough vs 1s CLAHE local contrast enhancement, dynamic clip limit, 8x8 tile grid, runtime metrics, and VO capture

modules.name: RETINEX
modules.source: camera 3840x2160 direct to RETINEX, then aspect-preserving RESIZE_RGA 1080x608
modules.effect: 1s passthrough vs 1s Retinex light correction through VMIX_RGA display, gain/threshold/log range metrics, CPU/GPU/RGA status, and VO capture

modules.name: CAP_DEHAZE
modules.source: camera 1920x1080 active image converted to BGR888, then CAP_DEHAZE refine_scale=0.25, then RESIZE_RGA 1080x608
modules.effect: 1s passthrough vs 1s CAP dehaze with guided radius/t0/beta/refine metrics and downstream frame counters

modules.name: CAP_DEHAZE_OFFLINE
modules.source: assets/loop/cap_dehaze/*.jpg copied from /userdata/rktohi/demo/cap_dehaze/input and sent to CAP_DEHAZE refine_scale=0.25
modules.effect: 3-sample offline original-vs-dehazed two-image comparison placed immediately after the live CAP_DEHAZE page in the customer loop

modules.name: DCP_FAST_DEHAZE
modules.source: camera through CSC_RGA RGB888, then DCP_FAST_DEHAZE, then RESIZE_RGA 1080x608
modules.effect: 1s passthrough vs 1s fast dark-channel dehaze with downstream frame counters

modules.name: THERMAL
modules.effect: 16-mode pseudo thermal color-map comparison, 3-second source switch, cached NV12 page render, CPU/GPU/RGA status logs, and VO capture

modules.name: CONV_CL
modules.effect: single CONV_CL group sequentially switches tables in three 10s stages: original SHARPEN/EDGE/EMBOSS/BLUR 3x3, RAW/SHARP 3x3/11x11/21x21, then RAW/BLUR 3x3/11x11/21x21, logs CPU/GPU/RGA and CL timing, and saves VO capture

modules.name: TRANSFORM
modules.source: camera 3840x2160 via VPSS 4x same-source NV12 outputs
modules.effect: RAW plus three TRANSFORM XY-LUT branches for undistort, rotate-zoom, and perspective warp with runtime counters and VO capture

modules.name: BLEND_PYR
modules.effect: soft wipe fusion

modules.name: EDOF_CL
modules.effect: near/far focus fusion comparison with stable reference output by default, cached NV12 page render, optional live OpenCL mode, CPU/GPU/RGA status logs, and VO capture

modules.name: EXPOSURE_FUSION_CL
modules.effect: HDR-style exposure fusion

modules.name: MCF_FUSION_CL
modules.effect: OpenCL color/mono detail fusion with reference fallback, cached NV12 page render, CPU/GPU/RGA and CL timing logs, and VO capture

modules.name: DUALVIEW
modules.source: generated RGB888 red/blue pair from demo_dualview_processing.c
modules.effect: side-by-side and line-by-line dual-output comparison

modules.name: STEREO_3D
modules.effect: VPSS raw plus 90-degree rotated branch merged by STEREO_3D without color tint

modules.name: VMIX
modules.effect: hardware compositor layout and alpha blending with live frame counters, CPU/GPU/RGA status, and VO capture

modules.name: VMIX_RGA
modules.effect: RGA compositor path

modules.name: PANO
modules.effect: six-image PTO module output at the full 8378x4190 panorama domain, scaled down by the page into the display frame, cached NV12 page render, EXIF-aware JPEG input loading, CPU/GPU/RGA logs, and VO capture; ALLDEMO_PANO_LIVE=0 keeps the fallback reference preview available

modules.name: AVM
modules.effect: 2D surround view

modules.name: SVM3D
modules.effect: 3D surround-view sweep

modules.name: NPU
modules.effect: VDEC + RGA + YOLOv5 detection boxes

modules.name: VENC
modules.effect: H.264 stream encode

modules.name: VDEC
modules.effect: network return preview

modules.name: RTSP_SEND
modules.effect: network stream out

modules.name: RTSP_RECV
modules.effect: network loopback in

modules.name: PIC_IO
modules.effect: image-sequence source and recorder
